summary: Release simulator/emulator samples now cover all iOS and Android SVG performance rows, but Instruments/device acceptance and final performance review are incomplete.

completedEntries.notes: Single visible animation sample only; full matrix still pending.

completedEntries.scenario: All nine Android SVG performance matrix rows
completedEntries.memory: before/after PSS and RSS captured per artifact
completedEntries.notes: Release-emulator samples captured with adb launch timing, gfxinfo, before/after meminfo, gesture/tap input where applicable, and screenshots. Rows remain partial until accepted target review is complete.

completedEntries.scenario: All nine iOS SVG performance matrix rows
completedEntries.notes: Release-simulator samples captured with simctl deep-link launch timing, process RSS, and screenshots. Rows remain partial because Instruments frame timing, synthetic gestures, physical-device behavior, and manual visible-correctness review are not complete.

requiredScenarios: range selector drag and thumb resize
scrollable bar horizontal scroll and selection
combined chart shared tooltip and legend
candlestick pan, pinch, and tap inspection
